backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing video clip management, YouTube OAuth integration, user profiles, admin access control, and clip analytics with similarity scoring and engagement calculations.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two high-confidence features: configuring VITE_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID environment variable and testing the complete Google OAuth connection flow.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend components, hooks, and configuration files describing the React application structure with YouTube integration, clip management, OAuth authentication, and admin functionality.
frontend/.env.example: Example environment file template with instructions for obtaining and configuring Google OAuth Client ID for YouTube Data API v3 integration.
frontend/.gitignore: Git ignore configuration excluding node_modules, build artifacts, editor files, logs, and environment variable files from version control.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles with custom OKLCH color system defining light and dark mode themes with primary, secondary, accent, and semantic color variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with 'Beast Clipping' title and root div for React application mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component with routing, authentication flow, profile setup, video URL management, AI clip suggestions, and layout integration using TanStack Router and React Query.
Admin debug panel component displaying authentication state, admin principals, backend initialization status, and character-by-character principal comparison with refresh and clipboard copy functionality.
frontend/src/components/AdminErrorBounda: React error boundary component that catches and displays errors in the admin panel with detailed error messages, stack traces, and recovery options.
frontend/src/components/AdminList.tsx: Displays a list of current admin users with their Principal IDs, showing loading states, error handling, and short user ID badges.
Form component for adding new admins by Principal ID with validation, success/error feedback, and integration with AdminList component.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Main admin dashboard showing statistics (total clips, trending analytics), debug panel, admin management, and a collapsible interface with error handling and retry logic.
frontend/src/components/ChannelConnectio: UI component for connecting/disconnecting Google/YouTube accounts, displaying channel status with avatar, and handling OAuth flow for YouTube integration.
frontend/src/components/ClipCard.tsx: Card component displaying video clip details with thumbnail, viral score, duration, and action buttons for deletion, YouTube posting, and downloading with validation for 60-second limit.
frontend/src/components/ClipList.tsx: Displays a scrollable list of saved video clips with loading states, empty states, and delete functionality. Allows selecting clips and shows the total count of saved clips.
Shows either AI-generated clip suggestions or trending viral clips with viral scores, timestamps, and durations. Provides buttons to apply suggested clips with their timestamps and titles.
frontend/src/components/ClipTimestampCon: Form component for creating video clips with title input and start/end timestamp controls (minutes/seconds). Handles clip creation, validation, and updates form when clips or suggestions are selected.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout with header, navigation, authentication controls, and admin button visibility logic. Manages Internet Identity login/logout and displays user ID information.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Onboarding form for new users to set up their profile with name and email. Validates input and saves profile data before allowing access to the main application.
frontend/src/components/UserIdDisplay.ts: Displays both a short user ID and full principal ID with copy-to-clipboard buttons. Shows visual feedback when IDs are copied successfully.
frontend/src/components/VideoUrlForm.tsx: Form component for entering YouTube URLs with validation, video loading, and AI clip generation functionality. Displays validation errors and loading states for both video loading and AI clip generation.
Badge component that displays a viral potential score (0-100) with color-coded styling, icons, and labels based on score thresholds (high/medium/low). Supports multiple sizes and optional label display.
frontend/src/components/YouTubePlayer.ts: Simple YouTube video player component that embeds a YouTube iframe with responsive 16:9 aspect ratio using the provided video ID.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that manages the backend actor instance, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state. Invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAddAdmin.ts: Mutation hook for adding admin users by user ID, invalidating admin-related queries on success. Currently expects full principal text rather than short user IDs.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminDebug.ts: Query hook that fetches admin debug information including current principal, admin status, and admin list. Returns placeholder data until backend method is fully implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminList.ts: Query hook that fetches the list of admin principals from the backend, enabled only when actor is available.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminStats.ts: Query hook that fetches admin statistics including total clips count and trending clip analytics from the backend with retry and stale time configuration.
Mutation hook for AI-powered clip generation that currently uses mock data to suggest viral clip segments with titles, timestamps, and viral scores. Designed to be replaced with actual AI service integration.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipCreation.ts: Mutation hook for creating video clips with automatic viral score calculation based on duration and title characteristics. Invalidates clip queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useClips.ts: Query and mutation hook for fetching all clips and deleting individual clips by ID. Tracks deletion state and invalidates queries on successful deletion.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipTimestamps.ts: State management hook for clip start/end timestamps with validation, formatting, and conversion between minutes/seconds and total seconds. Provides helpers for setting timestamps from seconds and validating time ranges.
frontend/src/hooks/useDownloadClip.ts: Mutation hook that generates a download URL for a video clip segment and triggers browser download with a sanitized filename. Shows toast notifications for success and error states.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity storage, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsOwner.ts: React Query hook that checks if the current user is an admin by calling the backend's isCallerAdmin() method, with extensive logging for debugging authentication state.
frontend/src/hooks/usePostToYouTube.ts: React Query mutation hook for posting video clips to YouTube, validating OAuth connection and clip duration (max 60 seconds for Shorts) before submission.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for user profile management, Google OAuth status checks, and YouTube channel connection state with cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useTrendingClips.ts: React Query hook that fetches trending video clips from the backend actor when available.
frontend/src/hooks/useYouTubeChannel.ts: Manages YouTube channel connection state and OAuth flow, providing mutations to connect/disconnect Google accounts with proper scope configuration for YouTube API access.
Utility hook providing functions to validate YouTube URLs and extract video IDs from various YouTube URL formats.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark theme color schemes using HSL color space.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/OAuthCallback.tsx: OAuth callback page that handles Google authorization code exchange, validates state parameter, stores credentials via backend, and redirects users with status feedback.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/src/utils/userIdGenerator.ts: Generates a deterministic 8-character user ID from a principal string using a simple hash function converted to base36.
frontend/src/utils/youtubeOAuthDebug.ts: Debugging utility class for tracking and logging YouTube OAuth flow events, including token validation, connection status changes, and common error detection.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, extended animations, typography and container query plugins.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file indicating a fix request for Google account connection/posting issues in Version 55, with features for Google OAuth configuration and testing.
